Interface ColumnTypeResolver

public interface ColumnTypeResolver
Resolves ColumnType for properties, TypeInformation, and values.
Since:
3.0
Author:
Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ColumnType
    resolve(@Nullable Object value)
    Resolve a ColumnType from a value.
    default CassandraColumnType
    resolve(CassandraPersistentProperty property)
    Resolve a CassandraColumnType from a CassandraPersistentProperty.
    CassandraColumnType
    resolve(CassandraType annotation)
    Resolve a CassandraColumnType from a CassandraType annotation.
    CassandraColumnType
    resolve(TypeInformation<?> typeInformation)
    Resolve a CassandraColumnType from TypeInformation.

  • Method Details

    • resolve

      default CassandraColumnType resolve(CassandraPersistentProperty property)
      Resolve a CassandraColumnType from a CassandraPersistentProperty. Considers CassandraType-annotated properties.
      Parameters:
      property - must not be null.
      Returns:
      Throws:
      InvalidDataAccessApiUsageException
      See Also:
      • CassandraType
      • CassandraPersistentProperty

    • resolve

      CassandraColumnType resolve(TypeInformation<?> typeInformation)
      Resolve a CassandraColumnType from TypeInformation. Considers potentially registered custom converters and simple type rules.
      Parameters:
      typeInformation - must not be null.
      Returns:
      Throws:
      InvalidDataAccessApiUsageException
      See Also:
      • CassandraSimpleTypeHolder
      • CassandraCustomConversions

    • resolve

      CassandraColumnType resolve(CassandraType annotation)
      Resolve a CassandraColumnType from a CassandraType annotation.
      Parameters:
      annotation - must not be null.
      Returns:
      Throws:
      InvalidDataAccessApiUsageException
      See Also:
      • CassandraType
      • CassandraPersistentProperty

    • resolve

      ColumnType resolve(@Nullable Object value)
      Resolve a ColumnType from a value. Considers potentially registered custom converters and simple type rules.
      Parameters:
      value -
      Returns:
      See Also:
      • CassandraSimpleTypeHolder
      • CassandraCustomConversions
